title: Full faction and endgame arc integration
summary: Integrate faction and endgame arcs through authoritative owner stores, deterministic state machines and scenario evidence.
acceptance: Implements or completes faction/endgame state through Simulation Worker or headless authority only
Uses bounded indexes, explicit serializable state machines and structured reasons
Adds headless scenario and invariant coverage for endgame/faction outcomes
Preserves M5 hashes unless reviewed migration evidence accepts a changed M8 baseline
Does not introduce UI authority, telemetry, account, paid-service or release behavior

history.details: Created by WM-0111 M8 UI/i18n scope amendment DAG; remains proposed until dependencies are done.

Implemented M8 faction/endgame owner slice with bounded sim-core store, headless scenario, invariant coverage, replay/performance evidence, docs/report; required checks pass and protected M5 hashes preserved.

changes_requested: High: M8FactionEndgameStore re-register paths rewrite active arc/route rows without unlink/relink or terminal-state/accounting guards, resetting explicit state while leaving indexes and metrics stale. High: route faction masks and arc contradiction/negotiation/failure masks accept out-of-domain values, including invalid faction bits and numeric wrap/truncation, violating bounded structured owner facts.

Repaired WM-0123 changes_requested: duplicate active arc/route registrations now fail closed without state/index/metric mutation; arc and route masks now reject unsafe/out-of-domain values before typed-array writes; focused repair tests plus required gates pass and M5 protected hashes remain stable.

verified: No blocking findings. Re-reviewed WM-0123 repairs: duplicate active arc/route registration fails closed without state/index/metric/ownerVersion mutation; unsafe/out-of-domain masks reject before storage; M5 protected hashes and required gates pass.
Verified by independent reviewer; rebased on main f400dd9; integration gates passed: typecheck, test, m5-invariants, 100k sim, validate-handoff, taskctl validate/status, git diff --check, quality.

review.summary: No blocking findings. Re-reviewed WM-0123 repairs: duplicate active arc/route registration fails closed without state/index/metric/ownerVersion mutation; unsafe/out-of-domain masks reject before storage; M5 protected hashes and required gates pass.

integration.summary: Verified by independent reviewer; rebased on main f400dd9; integration gates passed: typecheck, test, m5-invariants, 100k sim, validate-handoff, taskctl validate/status, git diff --check, quality.
